objective: Prove WebGPT can request a bounded one-line Monocle Man source mutation through the GitHub file-write bridge.
stop_condition: agent-state/last-result.json contains command_id apply-text-patch-proof-001 with status PASS, and monocle-man-site/src/main.jsx contains the requested one-line figcaption text change.

payload.exact_old: One lens. One side. No compromise.
payload.exact_new: One lens. One side. Evidence over opinion.
